productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Lavender Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this tote bag from United Colours Of Benetton is the best choice. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. The bag is large enough to accommodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciaitve glances all day long.Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durability One roomy compartment with magnectic closureOne inner zippered compartment for essentialsOne mobile pouchTwo zippers on the sides with tassles for more roomOne strap with bucklesSlightly pleated on the front and backBrand badge with brand name on the front and brand name appliqued on the insideLength :47 cmsWidth  :44 cmsBase   :9 cmsCareDo not wash, bleach, iron,dry clean or tumble dryRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
